iterations.label: dogfood10-findings-A-B-D
iterations.goal: Resolve 3 of 4 upstream findings from dogfood10 review-4: B (Codex 403 fallback signaling), D (Generator scope discipline - no unattended unit test generation), A (adapter-health smoke blind-spot rubric). Finding C (LOC threshold detection) deferred to iter-8.
iterations.summary: 3-sprint cycle closing dogfood10 findings A+B+D. M1 adds CODEX_UNAVAILABLE signal (flag + stderr block) to run-codex.sh final-failure path. M2 adds _common-rules.md §15 blocking Generator self-initiated unit test creation. M3 extends collectReviewInputs with productFetcherPaths + adds /vibe-review adapter-health blind-spot rubric (🔴 Blocker auto-seed). harnessVersion bump 1.4.3 → 1.5.0. Code LOC +80 net (well under 150 cap). 255/255 tests pass. Finding C deferred to iter-8 per budget split.

iterations.label: dogfood10-finding-C-app-loc-threshold
iterations.goal: Close dogfood10 review finding C by enforcing the prototype LOC exemption precondition through lightweight audit app-code LOC threshold detection.
iterations.summary: v1.6.6 adds app-code LOC scanning to scripts/vibe-audit-lightweight.mjs with audit.projectRoots and audit.prototypeLocThreshold config, injects LOC_THRESHOLD_BREACH pendingRisk metadata, extends pendingRisk schema, and updates Evaluator trigger docs so prototype exceptions are invalid when the breach is open.

iterations.label: rule-gates-and-wiring-drift
iterations.goal: Promote rule-audit from scanner-only toward explicit disposition gates, then add review-time wiring drift detection for created-but-unwired harness artifacts.
iterations.summary: Sprint 1 (v1.6.7) adds rule dispositions and --fail-on-undisposed to vibe-rule-audit. Sprint 2 (v1.6.8) adds collectReviewInputs().wiringDriftFindings and /vibe-review auto-seeding for created-but-unwired harness scripts.

iterations.label: dashboard-attention-wiring
iterations.goal: Wire the dashboard attention scripts discovered by v1.6.8 so Claude and Codex agent attention events reach the dashboard instead of remaining dead artifacts.
iterations.summary: v1.6.9 connects Claude Notification hooks to vibe-attention-notify, routes both Claude and Codex events through the shared vibe-attention writer, and verifies the current repo has zero wiring drift findings.
